content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

# Table: eabl

Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp; CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'; ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J09C_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09C_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

CREATE TABLE J09C_final AS SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR

UPDATE J09C_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'
